ops.title: lifeproto gen: slice fieldKind emits nonNil(...) but never defines nonNil — uncompilable if used
ops.description: Found 2026-07-19 by the comment-sweep record refuter. The `slice` fieldKind path in wire/lifeproto/gen is unused by the current schema AND latently broken: renderGo emits `nonNil(value)` for slice-kind fields, but the generator never emits a nonNil helper into lifeproto.go — so adding a []string field to spec.go today generates uncompilable Go. Fix the generator (emit the helper, or drop the dead slice path per no-defensive-coding) before any schema change introduces a slice field. Related: ccn note 11a45f1b (lifeproto codegen invariants), task 40f1034 (T1 generator comment dedup — could land together).

ops.text: go generate ./wire/... with a temporary slice-kind test field compiles, or the slice path is deleted outright
testdata/golden.json still pins byte-identical cross-language output after the fix
